Video.summary: Two thieves cause trouble after they overhear a conversation between a couple of businessmen.
Video.title: Trial by Fear

Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.
Video.title: A Sponge Full of Vinegar

Video.summary: A criminal sentenced to hang invents a complicated omelet to delay his execution.
Video.title: The Hangtown Fry

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: The story of Wyatt, Virgil, Morgan Earp and Doc Holliday after their gunfight with outlaws.
Video.title: After the O.K. Corral

Video.summary: A minister has ambitious, but not very popular, plans of building a church in Whiskey Gulch.
Video.title: Miracle at Whiskey Gulch

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A Navy officer faces down a vigilante mob.
Video.title: The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Image.alt: The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: California's ex-governor stops a war.
Video.title: The Firebrand

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Suspicion over a farm and its female owner creates a rift between two mining partners.
Video.title: The Lady and the Sourdough

Video.summary: Billy the Kid sets out to avenge the death of friend John Tunstall.
Video.title: The Kid From Hell's Kitchen

Video.summary: Robert Louis Stevenson is exploring a deserted mine with his son.
Video.title: The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo

Image.alt: The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo

Video.summary: Opportunist Monte Dunning uses the predictions of a fortune teller to intimidate his fellow miners.
Video.title: The Gypsy

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: After her father is jailed for contempt of court, Kate Melville takes over his job as sheriff.
Video.title: Kate Melville and the Law

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.
Video.title: One Fast Injun

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation
